_comment: Deployed root-owned to /etc/claude-code/managed-settings.json. Wires the baton fence as a PreToolUse hook for Bash and every MCP tool (mcp__.* — a bare prefix matches nothing and fails open). guard.py self-gates by OS uid, so this is a no-op for the human user and only fences the dedicated worker. The mcp__.* matcher is required so destructive MCP tools are inspected too.
